# sysctl settings are defined through files in
# /usr/lib/sysctl.d/, /run/sysctl.d/, and /etc/sysctl.d/.

# Vendors settings live in /usr/lib/sysctl.d/.

scan_output: Vulnerability openscap_055 not found in single-rule scan (possibly fixed)

llm_verdict.message: The remediation is complete. The line `kernel.randomize_va_space = 0` was removed from both `/etc/sysctl.conf` and `/etc/sysctl.d/99-sysctl.conf`, leaving only `kernel.randomize_va_space = 2`. The runtime value was set with `sysctl -w kernel.randomize_va_space=2`. A scan now reports the finding **openscap_055** as **PASS**.
